channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mitch McConnell breaks silence, said he was 'briefly unconscious' after a fall, got treated for mild pneumonia
item.description: 'My doctors have confirmed that I didn't break any bones ... I didn't have a heart attack or a stroke. I don't have any tumors or hemorrhages.'

item.title: Meet Dan Sullivan, the retired schoolteacher running for office who insists he's not trolling sitting Senator Dan Sullivan
item.description: It's Daniel J. Sullivan Jr., with no party affiliation, against Republican Dan S. Sullivan, who is also listed as 'incumbent,' on the ballot.

item.title: Exclusive: Delaware Secretary of State partners with Norm Ai to propose the AIC, a legal entity for agents
item.description: AI agents are already doing business. Delaware is moving to bring them inside a predictable American legal order, just like the LLC and PBC.

item.title: Trump adopts Iran's Strait of Hormuz strategy, using U.S. power over the key waterway to raise funds
item.description: Trump announced the U.S. will reimpose a naval blockade on Iran and charge fees on other cargo passing through the strait.
